title: Overview
desc: Developer documentation for api.currency.uwuapps.org — a self-hosted Frankfurter currency exchange rate API with 201 currencies, no API key, and no request quota.

title: Quick Start
desc: Make your first request to the currency exchange rate API in under a minute — no signup, no API key.

title: Latest Rates
desc: Fetch today's blended exchange rates, change the base currency, or filter to specific quotes.

title: Historical Rates
desc: Fetch exchange rates for any single date back to 1948.

title: Time Series
desc: Fetch exchange rates across a date range, with optional weekly or monthly downsampling.

title: Single Pair Rate
desc: Fetch one base/quote currency pair in a single call.

title: Currency Conversion
desc: Convert an amount between currencies client-side using the rate endpoint.

title: Currencies
desc: List all supported currencies, including legacy and retired ones, with provider coverage.

title: Providers
desc: The 84 central bank data sources behind the blended exchange rates, and how to pin to one.

title: Charting Historical Data
desc: Group flat time-series rows into per-currency series for Chart.js or pandas.

title: Output Formats
desc: Request JSON, CSV, or NDJSON responses from the API.

title: Errors
desc: HTTP status codes and the JSON error body shape returned by the API.

title: FAQ & Operational Notes
desc: Update frequency, uptime, rate limits, CORS, and provider quirks for this instance.
